title: Money Matters Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Not thinking that you are better than others; modest.
rounds.answer: humble
rounds.explanation: humble: Not thinking that you are better than others; modest.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Someone who is very forceful or ready to fight.
rounds.answer: aggressive
rounds.explanation: aggressive: Someone who is very forceful or ready to fight.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: In a way that is very noticeable or surprising.
rounds.answer: dramatically
rounds.explanation: dramatically: In a way that is very noticeable or surprising.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: In a way that shows you really want to do something.
rounds.answer: eagerly

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.answer: massive

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: She eagerly opened her birthday presents.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The dog was aggressive and barked loudly at strangers.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The library has an extensive collection of books on many subjects.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Money Matters: source text 2': A grandmother bargains _____ for a fair price on vegetables.
rounds.answer: firmly
rounds.explanation: The text says: A grandmother bargains firmly for a fair price on vegetables.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Notice Board, part 2': "I felt _____ when I arrived too.
rounds.answer: sensitive
rounds.explanation: The text says: "I felt sensitive when I arrived too.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Notice Board, part 1': She felt a little _____, like a chair with one short leg.
rounds.answer: uncomfortable
rounds.explanation: The text says: She felt a little uncomfortable, like a chair with one short leg.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Vocabulary Expert Interview
rounds.target: She eagerly opened her birthday presents.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Four-Minute Unit Talk
rounds.target: The dog was aggressive and barked loudly at strangers.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The school received a substantial donation to help buy new books.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The book I wanted to borrow is unavailable at the library.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: If it rains, staying inside is unavoidable.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'massive' mean in this unit?
choices: Not thinking that you are better than others; modest.
Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
rounds.answer: Very large or heavy.
rounds.explanation: massive: Very large or heavy.

rounds.prompt: What does 'unavailable' mean in this unit?
choices: Not thinking that you are better than others; modest.
Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
Not able to be used or not present.
rounds.answer: Not able to be used or not present.
rounds.explanation: unavailable: Not able to be used or not present.

rounds.prompt: What does 'meager' mean in this unit?
choices: Easily affected by things around you, like feelings or physical things.
Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
Not thinking that you are better than others; modest.
rounds.answer: Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
rounds.explanation: meager: Not enough; very small in amount or quality.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'substantial'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: substantial is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'unavoidable'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: unavoidable is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'frustrated'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: frustrated is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
Friendly and welcoming to guests or visitors.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: Easy to see or notice; clear enough to be seen.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: A special right or advantage that only some people have.
Not liked or enjoyed by many people.
To change something so that it works better in a new situation.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'firmly' mean?
choices: Feeling upset because you cannot do something you want to do.
In a strong and steady way; not easily moved or changed.
Something that is not certain or may not be true.
rounds.answer: In a strong and steady way; not easily moved or changed.
rounds.explanation: She held the rope firmly so it would not slip from her hands.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Notice Board, part 1': She had been _____ waiting to move into the school dormitory for weeks.
rounds.answer: eagerly
rounds.explanation: The text says: She had been eagerly waiting to move into the school dormitory for weeks.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Notice Board, part 1': She unpacked her _____ belongings — two books, a tiny photo frame, and a borrowed sweater.
rounds.answer: meager
rounds.explanation: The text says: She unpacked her meager belongings — two books, a tiny photo frame, and a borrowed sweater.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'humble' mean?
choices: Easily affected by things around you, like feelings or physical things.
In a strong and steady way; not easily moved or changed.
Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
Not thinking that you are better than others; modest.
rounds.answer: Not thinking that you are better than others; modest.
rounds.explanation: Even though he won the race, he remained humble and thanked his friends for their support.

rounds.prompt: What does 'eagerly' mean?
choices: Easily affected by things around you, like feelings or physical things.
In a strong and steady way; not easily moved or changed.
In a way that shows you really want to do something.
rounds.answer: In a way that shows you really want to do something.
rounds.explanation: She eagerly opened her birthday presents.

rounds.prompt: What does 'meager' mean?
choices: Easily affected by things around you, like feelings or physical things.
Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
Something that is not certain or may not be true.
rounds.answer: Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
rounds.explanation: The meal was meager, with only a small piece of bread and a little bit of soup.
